violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Staff informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, clutter or items were observed in the inactive walk-in cooler area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
Ceiling tiles in the retail area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
